name: Buckskin Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a large, heavy pot until crispy. Remove and set aside.
2. Add the venison (roughly ground), chopped onions, minced garlic, and salt to the bacon grease. Cook the venison until browned and remove it from the pot. Drain any excess grease.
3. Return the bacon to the pot. Add the wine, tomato sauce, and crumbled bacon. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat after 3 minutes of cooking. Add the Jalapeno peppers, venison mixture, Tabasco sauce, cumin, allspice, bitters, salt, anchos, red pepper flakes, and mushrooms.
5. Cook for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally or as needed.
6. Stir in the tomato paste and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
